examples: This has been caused by the advance of the legal age for going into industry and the impossibility of finding a job even when the legal age has been reached.
My mind could only assimilate one impossibility at a time.
It is a physical impossibility to be in two places at once.
Chillag speaks to a physicist in central Florida who figured out at least one impossibility: vampires.
Yet as I wrote at the time, what he was asserting was a physical impossibility.
